WipeRecord.title: WipeRecord
WipeRecord.description: Represents a record of a data wipe operation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the WipeRecord entity.

deviceId.description: Identifier of the device that was wiped. (Relationship: Device 1:N WipeRecord)

wipeAlgorithm.description: Algorithm used for the data wipe.

wipeStatus.description: Status of the data wipe operation (e.g., 'completed', 'failed', 'in progress').

startTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the wipe operation started.

endTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the wipe operation ended.

certificateId.description: Identifier of the generated wipe certificate. (Relationship: Certificate 1:1 WipeRecord)

verificationStatus.description: Status of the wipe verification process.

notes.description: Any notes or comments related to the data wipe operation.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Device entity.

serialNumber.description: Serial number of the storage device.

capacity.description: Storage capacity of the device in GB.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Certificate entity.

certificateData.description: The actual certificate data in JSON format.

digitalSignature.description: Digital signature for the certificate to ensure tamper-proof status.

generationTime.description: Timestamp indicating when the certificate was generated.
